description: A production planner needs to create the manufacturing schedule for the upcoming week based on demand forecasts and material availability.

nodes.task_description: Review the demand forecast for all products for the next month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the forecast and identifies which products have the most urgent demand.

nodes.task_description: Check the inventory of the required raw materials and API for the high-demand products.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that all necessary materials are in stock and released.

nodes.task_description: Create a production schedule that prioritizes the high-demand products and optimizes equipment utilization.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a schedule that sequences batches to minimize changeover times.

nodes.task_description: Publish the final schedule and create the electronic work orders for the scheduled batches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent publishes the schedule and the corresponding work orders are created in the MES.
